title: Tau Protein
script_summary: This video reveals the science behind tau protein and its implications for our understanding of the brain.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about tau protein than social media does.
Tau protein is crucial for stabilizing microtubules in our neurons.
But when tau misfolds, it can lead to neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer's.
Research shows that tau tangles disrupt communication between brain cells.
Understanding tau could unlock new treatments for these devastating conditions.
Curious about more brain science? Like and follow for the latest insights!
